description_long: This is a rectangular 1-liter juice carton with a vibrant blue background and prominent orange slice graphics, indicating it contains orange nectar. The front displays the Faragello brand logo in red and white, along with the product name 'Orange Nectar Premium' in bold white letters. The sides of the carton feature detailed nutritional information and multilingual product descriptions, while the back includes additional product details and a barcode. The top of the carton is flat with a small, colored screw cap for pouring. The packaging is made of laminated cardboard, likely with an inner foil or plastic lining to preserve freshness.
description: A blue rectangular 1-liter juice carton with orange slice graphics, Faragello branding, and a screw cap on top.
description_view_0: Front view showing the Faragello logo, orange slice graphics, and 'Orange Nectar Premium' text.
description_view_1: Side view displaying the nutritional information panel and part of the orange slice graphic.
description_view_2: Alternate front view with similar branding and graphics, but the text reads 'Orange Premium Nectar'.
description_view_3: Back view with multilingual product information, a barcode, and a portion of the orange slice graphic.
